Don't Over Do it!.note: Safe choice. C2 gambles for Practice Perfect but risks Practice Poor.

Extra Training.note: C1: -5 Energy, last stat +5, +5 Director friendship. C2: +5 Energy.

Get Well Soon!.note: Safe choice. C2 gambles for Practice Perfect but risks worse debuffs.

At Summer Camp (Year 2).note: C1: Power +10 (Carry logs). C2: Guts +10 (Swim in ocean).

New Year's Resolutions.note: C3: 20 Skill Pts. C2: 20 Energy. C1: Varies by character.

New Year's Shrine Visit.note: C2: All stats +5. C1: 30 Energy. C3: 35 Skill Pts.

Just an Acupuncturist, No Worries!.note: C4 (80-85%): Charming + Energy +20 + Mood +1. C5 (100%): safe Energy +10. Pick C4 unless already have Charming.
